page: Microsoft Azure E16ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the EADSv5 server family. It is powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor running at 3.525 GHz, featuring 8 physical cores and 16 vCPUs via hyperthreading. The memory configuration provides 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio. Local storage is bundled with a 614 GB disk, and the instance supports Premium Storage. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core tests placing in the top 25%. Multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and Geekbench multi-core metrics fall within the average range. Memory performance presents a notable tradeoff: while the PassMark memory score is strong and small-block cached read bandwidth is average at 1033.28 GB/sec, large-block uncached read and write bandwidths are weak, measuring 38.7 GB/sec and 22.85 GB/sec respectively.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory-to-vCPU ratio and bundled 614 GB local storage provide a dense resource profile for memory-bound workloads without requiring separate storage attachments. The instance is suited for memory-intensive applications, database operations, and caching layers such as Redis, where its average database operations and 15.84 million operations per second Redis SET performance are highly applicable.
description: Microsoft Azure E16ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor operating at 3.525 GHz. It features 16 vCPUs across 8 physical cores, 128.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 614 GB local storage disk. Benchmark results show strong single-core CPU performance and a strong PassMark memory score, though large-block uncached memory bandwidth is relatively weak. Multi-core CPU, database operations, and Redis SET benchmarks fall within the average range. With an 8.0 GB memory-per-core ratio and Premium Storage capability, this instance offers a resource-dense profile for memory-intensive workloads. It is suited for database hosting, caching layers, and memory-bound enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E16ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized VM featuring a 16-vCPU AMD EPYC 7763 processor, 128 GB RAM, and 614 GB local storage, suited for database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E16ads_v5 is a memory-optimized VM with 16 vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 614 GB local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, dense RAM allocation, and integrated local storage for database workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 16 vCPUs and 8 physical cores
128.0 GB RAM providing an 8.0 GB per core memory-optimized ratio
Bundled 614 GB local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong single-core CPU and PassMark memory benchmark performance
Weak large-block uncached memory read and write bandwidth tradeoffs
Suited for database operations, Redis caching, and memory-bound applications
